title: Geometric Entropy and Retrieval Phase Transitions in Continuous Thermal Dense Associative Memory
abstract: We study the thermodynamic memory capacity of modern Hopfield networks (Dense Associative Memory models) with continuous states under geometric constraints, extending classical analyses of pairwise associative memory. We derive thermodynamic phase boundaries for Dense Associative Memory networks with exponential capacity $p = e^{\alpha N}$, comparing Gaussian (LSE) and Epanechnikov (LSR) kernels. For continuous neurons on an $N$-sphere, the geometric entropy depends solely on the spherical geometry, not the kernel. In the sharp-kernel regime, the maximum theoretical capacity $\alpha = 0.5$ is achieved at zero temperature; below this threshold, a critical line separates retrieval from a spin-glass phase. The two kernels differ qualitatively in their phase boundary structure: for LSE, the retrieval region extends to arbitrarily high temperatures as $\alpha \to 0$, but interference from spurious patterns is always present. For LSR, the finite support introduces a threshold $\alpha_{\text{th}}$ below which no spurious patterns contribute to the noise floor, producing a qualitatively different retrieval regime in this sub-threshold region. These results advance the theory of high-capacity associative memory and clarify fundamental limits of retrieval robustness in modern attention-like memory architectures.
summary:
我们研究了几何约束下具有连续状态的现代 Hopfield 网络（密集联想记忆模型）的热力学记忆能力，扩展了成对联想记忆的经典分析。我们通过比较高斯 (LSE) 和 Epanechnikov (LSR) 内核，得出具有指数容量 $p = e^{\alpha N}$ 的密集联想记忆网络的热力学相边界。对于 $N$ 球体上的连续神经元，几何熵仅取决于球面几何形状，而不取决于内核。在锐核状态下，最大理论容量 $\alpha = 0.5$ 在零温度下实现；低于该阈值，一条临界线将回收与旋转玻璃相分开。这两个内核在相界结构上有质的不同：对于 LSE，检索区域延伸到任意高温，如 $\alpha \to 0$，但来自虚假模式的干扰始终存在。对于LSR，有限支持引入了一个阈值$\alpha_{\text{th}}$，低于该阈值则没有杂散模式对本底噪声产生影响，从而在该亚阈值区域中产生性质不同的检索机制。

这些结果推进了高容量联想记忆的理论，并阐明了现代类似注意力的记忆架构中检索鲁棒性的基本限制。

title: Score Shocks: The Burgers Equation Structure of Diffusion Generative Models
abstract: We analyze the score field of a diffusion generative model through a Burgers-type evolution law. For VE diffusion, the heat-evolved data density implies that the score obeys viscous Burgers in one dimension and the corresponding irrotational vector Burgers system in $\R^d$, giving a PDE view of \emph{speciation transitions} as the sharpening of inter-mode interfaces. For any binary decomposition of the noised density into two positive heat solutions, the score separates into a smooth background and a universal $\tanh$ interfacial term determined by the component log-ratio; near a regular binary mode boundary this yields a normal criterion for speciation. In symmetric binary Gaussian mixtures, the criterion recovers the critical diffusion time detected by the midpoint derivative of the score and agrees with the spectral criterion of Biroli, Bonnaire, de~Bortoli, and Mézard (2024). After subtracting the background drift, the inter-mode layer has a local Burgers $\tanh$ profile, which becomes global in the symmetric Gaussian case with width $\sigma_\tau^2/a$. We also quantify exponential amplification of score errors across this layer, show that Burgers dynamics preserves irrotationality, and use a change of variables to reduce the VP-SDE to the VE case, yielding a closed-form VP speciation time. Gaussian-mixture formulas are verified to machine precision, and the local theorem is checked numerically on a quartic double-well.
summary:
我们通过 Burgers 型演化定律分析扩散生成模型的得分场。对于 VE 扩散，热演化数据密度意味着分数服从一维粘性 Burgers 和 $\R^d$ 中相应的无旋矢量 Burgers 系统，给出了 \emph{形态转变} 的偏微分方程视图作为模式间界面的锐化。对于噪声密度到两个正热解的任何二元分解，分数分为平滑背景和由分量对数比确定的通用 $\tanh$ 界面项；在常规二元模式边界附近，这产生了物种形成的正常标准。在对称二元高斯混合物中，该准则恢复了由分数的中点导数检测到的临界扩散时间，并且与 Biroli、Bonnaire、de~Bortoli 和 Mézard (2024) 的谱准则一致。减去背景漂移后，模间层具有局部 Burgers $\tanh$ 轮廓，在宽度为 $\sigma_\tau^2/a$ 的对称高斯情况下变为全局轮廓。

我们还量化了这一层得分误差的指数放大，表明伯格动力学保留了无旋性，并使用变量的变化将 VP-SDE 减少到 VE 情况，从而产生封闭形式的 VP 形态时间。高斯混合公式经过机器精度验证，局部定理在四次双阱上进行数值检验。

title: Superradiance enhances and suppresses fermionic pairing based on universal critical scaling rate in two order parameters systems
abstract: Distinguished from the system with one order parameter, systems described by two or more order parameters will manifest more complex and much richer phase diagram and critical phenomena. In systems of two order parameters, the phase transition of one order parameter may influence the strength of another. Focus on the Landau's theory of continuous phase transitions, we give a general physcial quantity to decide the changing rate of the two order parameters based on a general formula of free energy. Taking two-mode Rabi model and the 1D Fermi Dicke model as the examples, we verify our analytical results and show how the superradiant phase transition manipulates the two-spin pairing strength and the superconductor band gap. Our work proposes the new paradigm to study the complex systems with two or more order parameters and provides novel avenue to enhancing or suppressing the desired physical effect by such interplay.
summary: 与只有一阶参数的系统不同，二阶或更多阶参数描述的系统将表现出更复杂、更丰富的相图和临界现象。在二阶参数系统中，一个阶参数的相变可能影响另一阶参数的强度。围绕朗道连续相变理论，基于自由能通式给出了决定二阶参数变化率的通用物理量。以二模拉比模型和一维费米迪克模型为例，验证了我们的分析结果，并展示了超辐射相变如何操纵二自旋配对强度和超导带隙。我们的工作提出了研究具有两个或多个阶次参数的复杂系统的新范式，并提供了通过这种相互作用来增强或抑制所需物理效应的新途径。

title: Rhythm as an ordered phase of sound: how musical meter emerges in a statistical mechanical model
abstract: We develop a model of musical rhythm and meter based on optimizing the trade-off between human psychological preferences for perceiving repeated patterns in time with a desire for variety and complexity. By mapping these competing preferences onto analogous quantities in statistical physics, we define an effective free energy which is minimized in the grand canonical ensemble. Using a mean field approximation, we observe phase transitions in the model from disordered events in time to orderings that closely reproduce those seen in music. We then compare the range of rhythmic characteristics predicted by the model to a dataset drawn from compositions by Johann Sebastian Bach, finding generally good quantitative agreement. The results provide a new lens through which to study musical rhythm, and a method for generatively producing rhythms.
summary: 我们开发了一种音乐节奏和节奏模型，该模型基于优化人类心理偏好之间的权衡，即及时感知重复模式与对多样性和复杂性的渴望。通过将这些相互竞争的偏好映射到统计物理学中的类似量，我们定义了在大正则系综中最小化的有效自由能。使用平均场近似，我们观察到模型中从时间上的无序事件到紧密再现音乐中所见的有序事件的相变。然后，我们将模型预测的节奏特征范围与从约翰·塞巴斯蒂安·巴赫的作品中提取的数据集进行比较，发现总体上具有良好的定量一致性。研究结果提供了研究音乐节奏的新视角，以及生成节奏的方法。

title: Stability of Supported Pd-based Ethanol Oxidation Reaction Electrocatalysts in Alkaline Media
abstract: This study evaluates the dissolution of the supported electrocatalysts Pd/C, PdSn/C, PdNb/C, and PdFe3O4/C during ethanol oxidation reaction for ADLFC applications. A scanning flow cell (SFC) coupled to an inductively coupled mass spectrometry (online ICP-MS) is used to assess the dissolution stability in a broad potential window. Accelerated stress tests with and without ethanol are developed using a rotating disk electrode (RDE) with dissolution products analysis by ex-situ ICP-MS. Potential profiles simulating those experienced by the catalyst during regular fuel cell operation were used. Sn and Fe catalysts demonstrate improved activity and stability compared with the material with Pd alone. For these reasons, PdSn/C and PdFe3O4/C are suitable for ADLFC applications. Severe Nb dissolution destabilizes Pd, increasing its leaching. This work demonstrates that while additional metals and oxides can improve the alcohol oxidation kinetics of Pd, these additives' dissolution stability must already be considered at the catalyst design stage.
summary: 本研究评估了 ADLFC 应用的乙醇氧化反应期间负载型电催化剂 Pd/C、PdSn/C、PdNb/C 和 PdFe3O4/C 的溶解情况。扫描流通池 (SFC) 与电感耦合质谱（在线 ICP-MS）联用，用于评估宽电位窗口中的溶出稳定性。使用旋转盘电极 (RDE) 开发有乙醇和无乙醇的加速应力测试，并通过异位 ICP-MS 进行溶出产物分析。使用了模拟催化剂在常规燃料电池运行期间所经历的电势分布。与单独含有 Pd 的材料相比，Sn 和 Fe 催化剂表现出更高的活性和稳定性。由于这些原因，PdSn/C 和 PdFe3O4/C 适合 ADLFC 应用。严重的铌溶解会破坏钯的稳定性，从而增加其浸出。这项工作表明，虽然额外的金属和氧化物可以改善钯的醇氧化动力学，但在催化剂设计阶段必须考虑这些添加剂的溶解稳定性。

title: Linear odd electrophoresis of a sphere in a charged chiral active fluid
abstract: The electrophoresis of charged colloidal particles in fluids exhibiting odd viscosity represents a fundamental challenge in understanding transport phenomena within charge-stabilized chiral active suspensions. Here, we provide the first concept of a charged chiral active fluid, where electrokinetics is coupled to odd Stokes flow, to explore how classical results from electrophoresis in Newtonian fluids generalize in the presence of odd viscosity. In particular, we derive a general expression for the electrophoretic mobility for particles of any shape under weak external electric fields using the Lorentz reciprocal theorem for odd fluids. By applying this result to a conducting charged sphere at low zeta potentials, we obtain an exact, closed-form analytical expression for the electrophoretic mobility, valid for arbitrary values of the Debye screening length and the odd-viscosity coefficient. Similar to Newtonian fluids, we find that the electrophoretic mobility is proportional to the translational mobility of an uncharged sphere, modulated by the Henry function. However, unlike in Newtonian fluids, odd viscosity leads to directional asymmetries in the electrophoretic mobility tensor that persist even for thin electric double layers. This case contrasts significantly with a charged anisotropic particle suspended in an isotropic Newtonian fluid, where anisotropic effects would vanish under the same electrostatic-screening conditions.
summary:
表现出奇怪粘度的流体中带电胶体颗粒的电泳代表了理解电荷稳定的手性活性悬浮液中的传输现象的基本挑战。在这里，我们提供了带电手性活性流体的第一个概念，其中电动学与奇数斯托克斯流耦合，以探索牛顿流体中电泳的经典结果如何在存在奇数粘度的情况下推广。特别是，我们利用奇数流体的洛伦兹倒数定理推导了弱外部电场下任何形状粒子的电泳迁移率的一般表达式。通过将此结果应用于低 zeta 电位的导电带电球，我们获得了电泳迁移率的精确、封闭形式的解析表达式，该表达式对于德拜筛选长度和奇粘度系数的任意值都有效。与牛顿流体类似，我们发现电泳迁移率与不带电球体的平移迁移率成正比，并由亨利函数调节。

然而，与牛顿流体不同的是，奇数粘度会导致电泳迁移率张量的方向不对称，即使对于薄双电层也仍然存在。这种情况与悬浮在各向同性牛顿流体中的带电各向异性粒子形成鲜明对比，在相同的静电屏蔽条件下，各向异性效应将消失。

title: d-Wave pair density wave superconductivity in a two-orbital model
abstract: Motivated by exploring superconductivity in multi-orbital systems, we study two orbital models of spinful fermions representing ($p_x,p_y$) or ($d_{xz}, d_{yz})$ orbitals on the square lattice. For minimal interorbital $t$-$J$ or $t$-$V$ on-site interactions, a random phase approximation uncovers regimes of instability towards incommensurate $d_{xy}$ pair density wave ($d$-PDW) superconductivity with driven by interband pairing. We study the competition of PDW order with uniform nodal $d_{xy}$ pairing states and magnetic and charge density wave (CDW) instabilities. At strong coupling, we derive an effective hard-core Cooper pair Hamiltonian which we study using a bosonic Gutzwiller ansatz to reveal a period-$2$ PDW over a wide range of fillings as well as a checkerboard CDW at quarter-filling. Our results apply to correlated multi-orbital materials with quasi-1D bands, Hubbard models on the square-octagon lattice, and atomic fermions in $p$-orbitals. Our work highlights the role of the orbital content and multiband Fermi surfaces in stabilizing interband PDW states.
summary: 通过探索多轨道系统中的超导性，我们研究了代表方晶格上 ($p_x,p_y$) 或 ($d_{xz}, d_{yz})$ 轨道的自旋费米子的两种轨道模型。对于最小轨道间 $t$-$J$ 或 $t$-$V$ 现场相互作用，随机相位近似揭示了由带间配对驱动的不相称 $d_{xy}$ 对密度波 ($d$-PDW) 超导性的不稳定状态。我们研究了 PDW 阶数与均匀节点 $d_{xy}$ 配对状态以及磁和电荷密度波 (CDW) 不稳定性的竞争。在强耦合下，我们推导了一个有效的硬核库珀对哈密顿量，我们使用玻色子 Gutzwiller ansatz 对其进行研究，以揭示在各种填充物上的周期 $2$ PDW 以及在四分之一填充物上的棋盘 CDW。我们的结果适用于具有准一维能带的相关多轨道材料、方八边形晶格上的哈伯德模型以及$p$轨道中的原子费米子。我们的工作强调了轨道内容和多带费米面在稳定带间 PDW 状态中的作用。

title: Fortuitous Universality of Bose-Kondo Impurities
abstract: We use the fuzzy-sphere approach to study the Bose-Kondo impurity problem, namely a spin-$S$ impurity coupled to the $(2+1)$-dimensional $O(3)$ Wilson-Fisher CFT (Heisenberg universality class). We demonstrate that for $S=1/2,1,3/2$ the impurity flows to a distinct stable interacting conformal defect for each $S$. Using large-scale exact diagonalization and density-matrix renormalization group methods, we observe integer-spaced defect spectrum consistent with defect conformal symmetry and compute several low-lying defect primary operators as well as the RG monotonic $g$-function. Our findings show that despite sharing the same symmetry and anomaly, Bose-Kondo impurities flow to distinct stable infrared conformal fixed points, which we refer to as \emph{fortuitous universality}. We expect this fortuitous universality to persist for all $S$, extending to $S\rightarrow\infty$, with each spin-$S$ impurity flowing to its own stable infrared conformal fixed point.
summary: 我们使用模糊球方法来研究 Bose-Kondo 杂质问题，即自旋 $S$ 杂质与 $(2+1)$ 维 $O(3)$ Wilson-Fisher CFT（海森堡普适类）耦合。我们证明，对于 $S=1/2,1,3/2$，杂质流向每个 $S$ 的独特稳定相互作用的共形缺陷。使用大规模精确对角化和密度矩阵重整化群方法，我们观察了与缺陷共形对称性一致的整数空间缺陷谱，并计算了几个低位缺陷主算子以及 RG 单调 $g$ 函数。我们的研究结果表明，尽管具有相同的对称性和异常性，但 Bose-Kondo 杂质会流向不同的稳定红外共形固定点，我们将其称为 \emph{偶然普遍性}。我们期望这种偶然的普遍性对于所有 $S$ 都持续存在，延伸到 $S\rightarrow\infty$，每个自旋 $S$ 杂质流向其自己的稳定红外共形固定点。

title: Statistical Physics of the Two-Dimensional Coulomb Liquid with Ionic Hard-Core Size
abstract: A self-consistent theory of bulk electrolytes incorporating electrostatic and hard-core interactions on an equal level is applied to the two-dimensional Coulomb liquid with finite ion size. The ionic pair distributions, the structure factors, and the thermodynamic functions of the formalism are compared with extensive Monte-Carlo simulation results from the literature. At moderate salt densities, our computational approach can accurately describe the thermodynamics of two-dimensional solutions from weak to intermediate coupling strengths. The improved accuracy of the present theory with respect to continuum approaches stems mainly from its ability to account for the non-uniform screening of electrostatic interactions associated with the impenetrability of the charged hard disks by their ionic atmosphere. At low salt densities, the validity domain of our self-consistent framework underestimating the extent of ionic cluster formation drops below the critical coupling domain where the conductor-insulator transition of two-dimensional charged hard disks occurs. This indicates that approaching the low-temperature dielectric phase via the present formalism will require the extension of the underlying self-consistent approximation at least up to the next cumulant order.
summary:
将静电和硬核相互作用纳入同等水平的本体电解质的自洽理论应用于具有有限离子尺寸的二维库仑液体。形式主义的离子对分布、结构因素和热力学函数与文献中广泛的蒙特卡罗模拟结果进行了比较。在中等盐密度下，我们的计算方法可以准确地描述从弱到中等耦合强度的二维溶液的热力学。本理论相对于连续介质方法的准确性的提高主要源于其能够解释静电相互作用的不均匀屏蔽，该静电相互作用与带电硬盘的离子气氛的不可穿透性相关。在低盐密度下，我们的自洽框架低估离子簇形成程度的有效域下降到二维带电硬盘发生导体-绝缘体转变的临界耦合域以下。

这表明通过目前的形式接近低温介电相将需要将底层自洽近似扩展至少到下一个累积量阶。

title: Multiscale morphology and contact mechanics of physisorbed Al and Cu nanoparticles
abstract: Using large-scale molecular dynamics simulations, we investigate the scaling of morphological and contact mechanics properties of Al and Cu nanoparticles (NPs) physisorbed on suspended graphene. The characteristic linear size of a NP ranges from 1 nm to 49 nm, covering a length scale of 1.5 decades. The NPs were obtained using a procedure mimicking thermal dewetting of thin films. Calculations show that NPs with a surface area-to-volume ratio above about 1.8 nm$^{-1}$, or with a linear size under 3-6 nm, behave differently from larger particles. For these smaller NPs, scaling of their total surface area and volume with the linear size can deviate from quadratic and cubic dependencies, respectively. Their mean interfacial separation and relative contact area change rapidly with size, exhibiting substantial variation. In contrast, for larger NPs, these quantities approach the thermodynamic limit. The height distributions of all particles exhibit a narrow spike and a decaying tail, both of which can be fit to Gaussians for larger NPs. In contrast, the interfacial gap distributions are close to a single Gaussian. The height power spectrum density (PSD) heatmaps of the smaller NPs are smeared and do not manifest a clear structure in contrast to the sixfold symmetry of the PSD of the larger ones. The maximum spatial frequency of the hexagonal 2D PSD roughly corresponds to the nearest-neighbor atomic distance of Al and Cu. For larger NPs with diameters of 20-25 nm, the isotropic height PSD exhibits power-law regions, which can be interpreted as self-affine roughness with Hurst exponents of 0.1-0.56. We also calculate the relative difference between the apparent contact area and the approximated area of the bottom atomic layer. Our simulations illustrate how surface topography evolves with NP size and suggest that larger NPs can have random surface roughness.
summary:
通过大规模分子动力学模拟，我们研究了物理吸附在悬浮石墨烯上的铝和铜纳米粒子 (NP) 的形态和接触力学性质的缩放。 NP 的特征线性尺寸范围为 1 nm 至 49 nm，覆盖 1.5 个十进制的长度尺度。使用模拟薄膜热去湿的程序获得纳米颗粒。计算表明，表面积与体积之比高于约 1.8 nm$^{-1}$ 或线性尺寸低于 3-6 nm 的纳米颗粒的行为与较大颗粒不同。对于这些较小的纳米颗粒，其总表面积和体积与线性尺寸的缩放可能分别偏离二次和三次依赖性。它们的平均界面分离和相对接触面积随着尺寸的变化而迅速变化，表现出很大的变化。相反，对于较大的纳米粒子，这些量接近热力学极限。所有粒子的高度分布都呈现出窄尖峰和衰减尾部，这两者都可以适合较大 NP 的高斯分布。相反，界面间隙分布接近单一高斯分布。

较小 NP 的高度功率谱密度 (PSD) 热图是模糊的，与较大 NP 的 PSD 的六重对称性相比，没有表现出清晰的结构。六方二维 PSD 的最大空间频率大致对应于 Al 和 Cu 的最近邻原子距离。对于直径为 20-25 nm 的较大 NP，各向同性高度 PSD 呈现幂律区域，这可以解释为赫斯特指数为 0.1-0.56 的自仿射粗糙度。我们还计算了底部原子层的表观接触面积和近似面积之间的相对差异。我们的模拟说明了表面形貌如何随纳米颗粒尺寸变化，并表明较大的纳米颗粒可以具有随机的表面粗糙度。

title: Bilattice-Catastrophe Isomorphism for Four-Valued Logic in Digital Systems
abstract: Belnap's four-valued logic, distinguished by its inherent bilattice structure, provides a natural algebraic bridge between discrete Four-valued logic (4VL) in circuit and continuous catastrophe theory (CT). Building on the rigorous verification of the bilattice-catastrophe isomorphism theorem, we establish a categorical correspondence spanning the catastrophe category, interlaced bilattice category, and 4VL category, with the cusp catastrophe emerging as the canonical CT counterpart to this http URL unification provides a foundational framework for explaining 4VL's robustness. Crucially, we demonstrate that the four-valued algebra FOUR is the minimal complete algebraic structure capable of describing continuous-discrete interfaces with involution symmetry. Unlike the empirical adoption of X and Z in engineering practice, our work reveals their mathematical necessity: X and Z are topological invariants of discretized continuous dynamical systems, encoding fundamental properties of catastrophe-induced discontinuities. The work enables cross-disciplinary extensions to uncertainty propagation, complex system modeling, and fault-tolerant design.
summary: Belnap 的四值逻辑以其固有的双格结构为特色，在电路中的离散四值逻辑 (4VL) 和连续突变理论 (CT) 之间提供了天然的代数桥梁。基于对 bilattice-catastrophe 同构定理的严格验证，我们建立了跨越灾难类别、交错 bilattice 类别和 4VL 类别的分类对应关系，其中尖点灾难作为此 http URL 统一的规范 CT 对应物而出现，为解释 4VL 的鲁棒性提供了基础框架。至关重要的是，我们证明了四值代数 FOUR 是能够描述具有对合对称性的连续离散界面的最小完全代数结构。与工程实践中 X 和 Z 的经验采用不同，我们的工作揭示了它们的数学必要性：X 和 Z 是离散连续动力系统的拓扑不变量，编码灾难引起的不连续性的基本属性。这项工作实现了不确定性传播、复杂系统建模和容错设计的跨学科扩展。

title: Localization--non-ergodic transition in controllable-dimension fractal networks from diffusion-limited aggregation
abstract: Our study connects the physics of disordered integer-dimensional systems and regular self-similar objects by studying spectral properties of fractal agglomerates with tunable dimension. The latter is controlled by parameter $\alpha$ of the algorithm that generates the agglomerates. We consider the nearest-neighbor tight-binding model on the agglomerates embedded in 2D and 3D, and observe that all eigenstates are localized in the 2D case, whereas in the 3D case, there is a localization--non-ergodic transition upon increasing $\alpha$,i.e., going from sparse to dense fractals: a sub-extensive number of critical states emerge in the spectrum at a certain critical value of $\alpha$. The complex geometry of the agglomerates is also responsible for a peculiar hierarchy of compact localized states and singularities in the density of states, which are typical for ordered fractals.
summary: 我们的研究通过研究具有可调维数的分形团聚体的光谱特性，将无序整数维系统和规则自相似物体的物理学联系起来。后者由生成团聚物的算法的参数 $\alpha$ 控制。我们考虑嵌入在 2D 和 3D 中的团聚体的最近邻紧束缚模型，并观察到所有本征态在 2D 情况下都局域化，而在 3D 情况下，随着 $\alpha$ 的增加，存在局域化非遍历转变，即从稀疏分形到稠密分形：在某个临界值 $\alpha$ 处，谱中出现了次广数量的临界态。团聚体的复杂几何形状还导致了紧凑局域态的特殊层次结构和态密度的奇异性，这是有序分形的典型特征。

title: Generative optimal transport via forward-backward HJB matching
abstract: Controlling the evolution of a many-body stochastic system from a disordered reference state to a structured target ensemble, characterized empirically through samples, arises naturally in non-equilibrium statistical mechanics and stochastic control. The natural relaxation of such a system - driven by diffusion - runs from the structured target toward the disordered reference. The natural question is then: what is the minimum-work stochastic process that reverses this relaxation, given a pathwise cost functional combining spatial penalties and control effort? Computing this optimal process requires knowledge of trajectories that already sample the target ensemble - precisely the object one is trying to construct. We resolve this by establishing a time-reversal duality: the value function governing the hard backward dynamics satisfies an equivalent forward-in-time HJB equation, whose solution can be read off directly from the tractable forward relaxation trajectories. Via the Cole-Hopf transformation and its associated Feynman-Kac representation, this forward potential is computed as a path-space free energy averaged over these forward trajectories - the same relaxation paths that are easy to simulate - without any backward simulation or knowledge of the target beyond samples. The resulting framework provides a physically interpretable description of stochastic transport in terms of path-space free energy, risk-sensitive control, and spatial cost geometry. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples that visualize the learned value function and the induced controlled diffusions, demonstrating how spatial cost fields shape transport geometry analogously to Fermat's Principle in inhomogeneous media. Our results establish a unifying connection between stochastic optimal control, Schrödinger bridge theory, and non-equilibrium statistical mechanics.
summary:
控制多体随机系统从无序参考状态到结构化目标系综的演化（通过样本凭经验表征）自然出现在非平衡统计力学和随机控制中。这种系统的自然松弛——由扩散驱动——从结构化目标走向无序参考。那么自然的问题是：给定结合空间惩罚和控制努力的路径成本函数，逆转这种松弛的最小工作随机过程是什么？计算这一最佳过程需要了解已经对目标集合进行采样的轨迹——确切地说是人们试图构建的对象。我们通过建立时间反转对偶性来解决这个问题：控制硬后向动力学的值函数满足等效的前向时间 HJB 方程，其解可以直接从易于处理的前向弛豫轨迹中读出。

通过 Cole-Hopf 变换及其相关的 Feynman-Kac 表示，该前向势被计算为在这些前向轨迹上平均的路径空间自由能（易于模拟的相同松弛路径），无需任何后向模拟或对样本之外的目标的了解。由此产生的框架从路径空间自由能、风险敏感控制和空间成本几何方面提供了随机传输的物理可解释描述。我们用数值示例来说明该理论，这些示例将学习的价值函数和诱导的受控扩散可视化，展示了空间成本场如何塑造传输几何形状，类似于非均匀介质中的费马原理。我们的结果在随机最优控制、薛定谔桥理论和非平衡统计力学之间建立了统一的联系。

title: Directional Criticality and Higher-Order Flatness: Designing Van Hove Singularities in Three Dimensions
abstract: Van Hove singularities (VHSs) play a pivotal role in driving correlated electronic phenomena. Traditional classifications focus only on critical points where the band gradient vanishes in all directions. Here we establish a unified classification of VHSs in three-dimensional systems, characterized by the number of vanishing gradient components and Hessian eigenvalues: ordinary ($M$-type), higher-order ($T_1$, $T_2$, $T_3$), noncritical ordinary ($N_0$, $N_1$, $N_2$), and noncritical higher-order ($S_1$, $S_2$) types. Noncritical VHSs exhibit directional quenching: the gradient vanishes in a two-dimensional subspace while remaining finite along the orthogonal direction, yielding finite density-of-states enhancements with distinct energy dependencies. Using an $s$-orbital tight-binding model on the pyrochlore lattice with spin-orbit coupling, we demonstrate that all singularity classes emerge at distinct high-symmetry points through controlled tuning of the hopping ratio. This work establishes directional criticality and higher-order flatness as design principles for tailoring density-of-states enhancements in three-dimensional quantum materials.
summary: 范霍夫奇点 (VHS) 在驱动相关电子现象方面发挥着关键作用。传统的分类仅关注能带梯度在所有方向上消失的关键点。这里我们建立了三维系统中VHS的统一分类，以消失梯度分量和Hessian特征值的数量为特征：普通（$M$型）、高阶（$T_1$、$T_2$、$T_3$）、非关键普通（$N_0$、$N_1$、$N_2$）和非关键高阶（$S_1$、$S_2$）类型。非临界 VHS 表现出定向猝灭：梯度在二维子空间中消失，同时沿正交方向保持有限，从而产生具有不同能量依赖性的有限状态密度增强。在具有自旋轨道耦合的烧绿石晶格上使用 $s$ 轨道紧束缚模型，我们证明了通过控制跳跃比的调整，所有奇点类都出现在不同的高对称点上。这项工作建立了方向临界性和高阶平坦度作为定制三维量子材料状态密度增强的设计原则。

title: Granular Superconductivity in La$_{2}$PrNi$_{2}$O$_{7-δ}$ Thin Films
abstract: Superconductivity realized in bilayer nickelate thin films enables direct spectroscopic and transport studies at ambient pressure. However, a persistent two-step resistive transition remains a major barrier to achieving optimal superconducting properties. Here, we show that the two-step transition in La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_{7-\delta}$ thin films originates from the granular nature of superconductivity, specifically, the coexistence of two distinct superconducting grain phases coupled by a Josephson junction network. A secondary, lower-temperature transition appears in the $R(T)$ curve, even when residual resistance becomes vanishingly small near 30 K. This two-step behavior significantly lowers the zero-resistance transition temperature, $T_{c, zero}$$\approx$ 10 K, and limits advanced spectroscopic studies. Our findings reveal the microscopic mechanism underlying the two-step transition in thin films and underscore the need for improved oxygen homogeneity to achieve bulk superconductivity in this system.
summary: 在双层镍酸盐薄膜中实现的超导使得能够在环境压力下进行直接光谱和传输研究。然而，持续的两步电阻转变仍然是实现最佳超导性能的主要障碍。在这里，我们证明 La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_{7-\delta}$ 薄膜中的两步转变源于超导的颗粒性质，具体来说，是通过约瑟夫森结网络耦合的两个不同的超导颗粒相的共存。即使当残余电阻在 30 K 附近变得微乎其微时，$R(T)$ 曲线中也会出现二次较低温度的转变。这种两步行为显着降低了零电阻转变温度 $T_{c, Zero}$$\approx$ 10 K，并限制了高级光谱研究。我们的研究结果揭示了薄膜中两步转变的微观机制，并强调需要改善氧的均匀性以在该系统中实现体超导。

title: Spectral solution of axisymmetric magnetization problems for thin superconducting shells
abstract: Existing numerical methods for modeling magnetization in thin type-II superconducting films have mostly been developed for flat films. This work introduces an efficient spectral method for axisymmetric magnetization problems involving non-flat films. The method is based on the integral thin-shell current-density formulation of the problem, employs Chebyshev polynomial expansions for spatial discretization, and uses the method of lines for time integration. It applies to both open and closed axisymmetric shells and is so accurate that the solutions obtained can serve as benchmarks for numerical methods for general, not necessarily axisymmetric, thin-shell magnetization problems. As one of the examples, we consider magnetic shielding by a superconducting sphere.
summary: 现有的用于模拟 II 型超导薄膜磁化强度的数值方法大多是针对平面薄膜开发的。这项工作介绍了一种有效的谱方法，用于解决涉及非平面薄膜的轴对称磁化问题。该方法基于问题的积分薄壳电流密度公式，采用切比雪夫多项式展开进行空间离散，并采用直线法进行时间积分。它适用于开轴对称壳和闭轴对称壳，并且非常精确，所获得的解可以作为一般（不一定是轴对称）薄壳磁化问题的数值方法的基准。作为示例之一，我们考虑超导球体的磁屏蔽。

title: Emergence of Lissajous trajectories in skyrmion oscillator
abstract: Understanding the dynamics of current-driven skyrmion is essential for their practical applications. In this study, we apply an AC current pulse (a) in x-- direction, and (b) in both x-- and y-- directions through the free layer of a Co/Pt thin film and investigate the motion of the skyrmion. We show that the skyrmion follows the sinusoidal current pulse and behaves like a forced oscillator in the range of current amplitude 1 $\times$ 10$^{11}$ A/m$^2$ to 1 $\times$ 10$^{12}$ A/m$^2$ and frequency 5 $\times$ 10$^{8}$ Hz to 1 $\times$ 10$^{10}$ Hz. For current pulse of (A$_1$sin$\omega_1$t, A$_2$sin($\omega_2$t+$\phi$), 0), the skyrmion forms Lissajous figures in the x-y plane, same as observed in classical mechanics. The results are compared at T = 0 K and T $>$ 0 K to analyze the effect of temperature. As the skyrmion Hall angle ($\theta_{SkH}$) and stochastic thermal fluctuation ($\textbf{F}^{Th}$) are functions of temperature, the skyrmion starts deviating from its path at T = 0 K with increasing temperature and eventually generates somewhat deformed Lissajous figures from ideal.
summary: 了解电流驱动的斯格明子的动力学对于其实际应用至关重要。在本研究中，我们通过 Co/Pt 薄膜的自由层施加 (a) x 方向和 (b) x 和 y 方向的交流电流脉冲，并研究斯格明子的运动。我们表明，斯格明子遵循正弦电流脉冲，并且在电流幅度 1 $\times$ 10$^{11}$ A/m$^2$ 到 1 $\times$ 10$^{12}$ A/m$^2$ 和频率 5 $\times$ 10$^{8}$ Hz 到 1 $\times$ 10$^{10}$ Hz 范围内表现得像受迫振荡器。对于 (A$_1$sin$\omega_1$t, A$_2$sin($\omega_2$t+$\phi$), 0) 的电流脉冲，斯格明子在 x-y 平面上形成李萨如图形，与经典力学中观察到的相同。比较 T = 0 K 和 T $>$ 0 K 时的结果，以分析温度的影响。由于斯格明子霍尔角 ($\theta_{SkH}$) 和随机热涨落 ($\textbf{F}^{Th}$) 是温度的函数，随着温度的升高，斯格明子在 T = 0 K 时开始偏离其路径，并最终生成与理想情况有些变形的利萨如图。

title: Oxophilic Silver-Based Nanoparticles with Low Pd-Au Loading for Ethanol and Glycerol Electrooxidation in Alkaline Media
abstract: The electrocatalytic activity of oxophilic Ag nanoparticles, combined with small amounts of Pd and Au, was investigated for ethanol oxidation reactions (EOR) and glycerol oxidation reactions (GOR) in alkaline media. The EOR and GOR results revealed competitive current densities and less positive onset potentials for the AgPd/C and AgPdAu/C electrocatalysts, both containing 5 wt% Pd, compared to the commercial Pd/C catalyst, which has a significantly higher loading of the costly noble metal (20 wt%). In situ FTIR analyses during EOR confirmed that ethanol is initially adsorbed as acetylated species, which are subsequently oxidized to acetate ions, the main stable product in alkaline medium. However, the incorporation of Pd and Au into the Ag matrix did not significantly alter the reaction mechanism. During GOR, the in situ FTIR studies demonstrated that catalyst composition influences the oxidation pathways: Pd-rich surfaces favor oxalate formation, while a significant presence of Ag promotes deeper oxidation (up to carbonate), with the AgPdAu ternary catalyst exhibiting intermediate behavior. One key benefit is the lower susceptibility of Ag to irreversible adsorption of reaction byproducts, which enhances electrocatalyst durability. Thus, surface segregation of Ag at high potentials can modify the catalytic surface reactivity, affecting both stability and efficiency.
summary:
研究了亲氧性 Ag 纳米粒子与少量 Pd 和 Au 相结合对碱性介质中乙醇氧化反应 (EOR) 和甘油氧化反应 (GOR) 的电催化活性。 EOR 和 GOR 结果显示，与商业 Pd/C 催化剂相比，AgPd/C 和 AgPdAu/C 电催化剂（均含有 5 wt% Pd）具有竞争性的电流密度和较低的正起始电位，而商业 Pd/C 催化剂的昂贵贵金属负载量明显更高（20 wt%）。 EOR 期间的原位 FTIR 分析证实，乙醇最初作为乙酰化物质被吸附，随后被氧化为乙酸根离子，这是碱性介质中的主要稳定产物。然而，将 Pd 和 Au 掺入 Ag 基质中并没有显着改变反应机理。在 GOR 过程中，原位 FTIR 研究表明，催化剂成分会影响氧化途径：富含 Pd 的表面有利于草酸盐的形成，而大量 Ag 的存在则促进更深层次的氧化（直至碳酸盐），而 AgPdAu 三元催化剂表现出中间行为。

一个主要优点是银对反应副产物不可逆吸附的敏感性较低，从而提高了电催化剂的耐用性。因此，高电位下银的表面偏析可以改变催化表面反应性，影响稳定性和效率。

title: Unveiling the Core of Materials Properties via SISSO and Sensitivity Analysis
abstract: Interpretable AI can reveal physical principles governing intricate materials properties by uncovering explicit relationships between physical parameters and target properties. The sure-independence screening and sparsifying operator (SISSO) symbolic-regression approach identifies analytical expressions that correlate a target property with a small set of parameters, termed materials genes, selected from a large pool of candidates. However, multiple gene combinations can yield equally accurate SISSO models, with individual genes contributing with different weights. Here, we establish a derivative-based sensitivity analysis that resolves the non-uniqueness of symbolic-regression descriptions, enhances interpretability, thereby enabling deeper physical insight. This analysis reveals how distinct gene combinations encode equivalent information and identifies valence orbital radii, nuclear charges, and their products as the key quantities governing the equilibrium lattice constant of perovskites.
summary: 可解释的人工智能可以通过揭示物理参数和目标属性之间的明确关系来揭示控制复杂材料属性的物理原理。确保独立筛选和稀疏算子 (SISSO) 符号回归方法识别将目标属性与从大量候选者中选择的一小组参数（称为材料基因）相关联的分析表达式。然而，多个基因组合可以产生同样准确的 SISSO 模型，其中各个基因贡献不同的权重。在这里，我们建立了一种基于导数的敏感性分析，解决了符号回归描述的非唯一性，增强了可解释性，从而实现了更深入的物理洞察。该分析揭示了不同的基因组合如何编码等效信息，并将价轨道半径、核电荷及其产物识别为控制钙钛矿平衡晶格常数的关键量。

title: Spatially Structured Cohesion from Extremal Alignment in Topological Active Matter
abstract: Alignment interactions in active matter are typically modeled as relaxational dynamics toward local consensus. In unbounded systems, this makes alignment effectively decoupled from local density and therefore unable to sustain self-confined collective motion without additional attractive forces. Here we show that this limitation can be overcome by extremal alignment rules in which the interaction neighborhood depends on the candidate orientation. For a broad class of candidate- dependent rules with pairwise additive utilities, the decision utility factorizes into the product of an average interaction score and the number of selected neighbors. This multiplicative structure couples orientational decisions to local density and thereby generates an effective cohesive bias without explicit cohesive forces. In metric models, however, the same mechanism drives collapse toward globally connected, effectively mean-field states that suppress spatial structure. We show that topological interactions regularize this tendency, stabilizing self-confined flocks of finite extent in open space. The resulting dynamics exhibits a rich dynamical phase diagram as a function of noise intensity and turning rate, including polarized flocks, swarms, and persistent swirling states. Our results identify candidate-dependent extremal alignment as a simple mechanism for generating cohesive, spatially structured active matter beyond the standard relaxational paradigm.
summary:
活性物质中的排列相互作用通常被建模为朝向局部共识的松弛动力学。在无界系统中，这使得排列有效地与局部密度脱钩，因此无法在没有额外吸引力的情况下维持自我限制的集体运动。在这里，我们表明，这种限制可以通过极值对齐规则来克服，其中交互邻域取决于候选方向。对于具有成对相加效用的一大类候选相关规则，决策效用分解为平均交互得分与所选邻居数量的乘积。这种乘法结构将方向决策与局部密度结合起来，从而在没有明确内聚力的情况下产生有效的内聚偏差。然而，在度量模型中，相同的机制会导致塌缩向全局连接的、有效的平均场态方向发展，从而抑制空间结构。我们表明，拓扑相互作用使这种趋势规律化，从而稳定了开放空间中有限范围内的自我限制群体。

由此产生的动力学表现出丰富的动态相图，作为噪声强度和转动速率的函数，包括极化的群、群和持续的漩涡状态。我们的结果将候选相关的极值对齐确定为一种简单的机制，用于生成超出标准松弛范式的内聚的、空间结构化的活性物质。

title: Equivariant Many-body Message Passing Interatomic Potentials for Magnetic Materials
abstract: Magnetism governs key properties of materials used in energy, data storage, and spintronic technologies, yet its complex coupling to lattice and electronic degrees of freedom challenges conventional first-principles approaches. We introduce an equivariant message-passing graph neural network that embeds atomic magnetic moments as explicit degrees of freedom, enabling the learning of magnetic interactions beyond collinear approximations. The model learns physically consistent and transferable representations of magnetic behaviour and can incorporate spin-orbit coupling, achieving near density-functional-theory accuracy with strong data efficiency across diverse magnetic systems by fine-tuning from a pre-trained model. Applications to structural transformations, finite-temperature magnetic phenomena, and materials screening for strongly spin-orbit coupled materials demonstrate transferable magnetic behaviour, establishing a practical foundation for data-driven, high-throughput discovery of complex magnetic materials.
summary: 磁性控制着能源、数据存储和自旋电子技术中使用的材料的关键特性，但其与晶格和电子自由度的复杂耦合对传统的第一原理方法提出了挑战。我们引入了一种等变消息传递图神经网络，它将原子磁矩嵌入为明确的自由度，从而能够学习超越共线近似的磁相互作用。该模型学习磁行为的物理一致和可转移的表示，并且可以结合自旋轨道耦合，通过对预训练模型进行微调，在不同的磁系统中实现接近密度泛函理论的精度和强大的数据效率。在结构转变、有限温度磁现象和强自旋轨道耦合材料的材料筛选中的应用展示了可转移的磁行为，为数据驱动、高通量发现复杂磁性材料奠定了实用基础。

title: Chirality of Zitterbewegung and its relation to Berry curvature in Dirac systems
abstract: We establish an exact analytical relation between Zitterbewegung dynamics and the band geometry in two-dimensional Dirac systems. By identifying a time-independent antisymmetric observable-the \textit{areal rate of Zitterbewegung}-we show that this quantity is directly determined by the Berry curvature. Its sign defines the sense of rotation and reproduces the contributions of Dirac points to the Chern number. This relation is independent of the initial state and holds for generic two-band Dirac models. Our findings reveal a direct connection between interband quantum dynamics and topological band geometry beyond the semiclassical regime.
summary: 我们在二维狄拉克系统中的 Zitterbewegung 动力学和能带几何结构之间建立了精确的解析关系。通过识别与时间无关的反对称可观测量（\textit{Zitterbewegung 面积率}），我们表明该量直接由贝里曲率决定。它的符号定义了旋转方向并再现了狄拉克点对陈数的贡献。这种关系与初始状态无关，并且适用于一般的两带狄拉克模型。我们的研究结果揭示了带间量子动力学与半经典体系之外的拓扑能带几何之间的直接联系。

title: Giant photostriction in lead-free ferroelectric stemming from photo-excited thermalized carriers
abstract: Ferroelectrics are polar materials whose polarization can be switched by applying electric fields; they offer unique opportunities to develop performant photostrictive materials, i.e., materials that can deform under visible light illumination. Naturally devoid of inversion symmetry, they exhibit original photogalvanic effects such as the Bulk Photovoltaic Effect, which relies on ``hot'' photoexcited carriers. It has long been thought that the electric field generated by this effect may couple to the natural piezoelectric abilities of ferroelectrics to provide large photoinduced deformations. However, due to competing effects, such as thermal dilatation, deformation potential, polarization, or depolarizing-field screening by \textit{thermalized} carriers, it remains unclear which microscopic phenomena govern the photoinduced deformations in classical ferroelectric materials. Here, we demonstrate the largest photoinduced deformation measured in a ferroelectric thin film. Reaching 1 %, this giant photostriction likely originates from the contribution of thermalized photoinduced carriers.
summary: 铁电体是极性材料，其极化可以通过施加电场来切换；它们为开发高性能光致材料（即在可见光照射下可变形的材料）提供了独特的机会。它们天然缺乏反演对称性，表现出原始的光电效应，例如依赖于“热”光激发载流子的体光伏效应。长期以来，人们一直认为这种效应产生的电场可能与铁电体的天然压电能力耦合，以提供大的光致变形。然而，由于竞争效应，例如热膨胀、变形电势、极化或\textit{热化}载流子的去极化场屏蔽，目前尚不清楚哪种微观现象控制经典铁电材料中的光致变形。在这里，我们展示了在铁电薄膜中测量的最大光致变形。达到 1%，这种巨大的光致伸缩可能源于热化光生载流子的贡献。

title: Odd-parity Magnetism from the Generalized Bloch Theorem
abstract: In the non-relativistic limit, helimagnetic order is always associated with odd-parity magnetism. That is, for single-particle states the expectation value of the electronic spin is odd in crystal momentum, which implies direct control of the spin by means of electric fields. However, the theoretical description of helimagnets is hindered by the fact that the spiral pitch may require large super cells or even be incommensurate with the lattice. In the this letter we show that such issues may be remedied by use of the Generalized Bloch theorem. It allows one to describe (by models or first principles) the system in terms of the primitive unit cell, from which all relevant properties can be obtained by downfolding in reciprocal space. We exemplify the procedure using MnI$_2$ and NiI$_2$, which are known type II multiferroics having spiral order and the helimagnetic metal MnTe$_2$. We analyze how the magnitude of spin splitting depends on orbital composition of bands, and we show that spin splitting is maximized for states having large odd-orbital ($p$-type) character. It is straightforward to generalize the framework to handle response functions for helimagnets using only the primitive unit cell and the present downfolding procedure thus strongly facilitate theoretical progress in the field.
summary:
在非相对论极限下，螺旋磁序总是与奇宇称磁性相关。也就是说，对于单粒子态，电子自旋的期望值在晶体动量中是奇数，这意味着通过电场直接控制自旋。然而，螺距可能需要大的超级晶胞，甚至与晶格不相称，这一事实阻碍了螺旋磁体的理论描述。在这封信中，我们表明可以通过使用广义布洛赫定理来解决这些问题。它允许人们根据原始晶胞来描述（通过模型或第一原理）系统，通过在倒易空间中向下折叠可以从中获得所有相关属性。我们使用 MnI$_2$ 和 NiI$_2$ 来举例说明该过程，它们是已知的具有螺旋序的 II 型多铁性材料和螺旋磁性金属 MnTe$_2$。我们分析了自旋分裂的大小如何取决于能带的轨道组成，并且我们表明，对于具有大奇数轨道（$p$型）特征的状态，自旋分裂最大化。

仅使用原始晶胞就可以直接推广处理螺旋磁体响应函数的框架，并且当前的向下折叠过程因此极大地促进了该领域的理论进展。

title: Topological multicomponent-pairing superconductivity in twisted bilayer cuprates
abstract: We investigate the emergence of a multicomponent superconducting state in twisted bilayer cuprates, characterized by the order parameter $s+d_1 e^{i\phi_1}+d_2 e^{i\phi_2}$, where $s=s_1+s_2$ denotes the symmetric combination of the layer-resolved $s$-wave components, and $s_i$ and $d_i$ ($i=1,2$) represent the $s$-wave and $d$-wave pairings associated with the individual layers. In particular, when $\phi_1-\phi_2\neq 0,\pi$, this three-component pairing state is topologically nontrivial. By combining Ginzburg--Landau analysis with self-consistent mean-field calculations based on a microscopic model, we show that such a topological three-component pairing state can be stabilized over a substantial parameter regime. Our results indicate that twisted bilayer cuprates can remain chiral and topological even in the presence of a sizable $s$-wave pairing component.
summary: 我们研究了扭曲双层铜酸盐中多组分超导态的出现，其特征在于序参数 $s+d_1 e^{i\phi_1}+d_2 e^{i\phi_2}$，其中 $s=s_1+s_2$ 表示层解析 $s$ 波分量的对称组合，$s_i$ 和 $d_i$ ($i=1,2$) 表示 $s$ 波和与各个层相关的 $d$ 波配对。特别是，当 $\phi_1-\phi_2\neq 0,\pi$ 时，这种三分量配对状态在拓扑上是不平凡的。通过将金兹堡-朗道分析与基于微观模型的自洽平均场计算相结合，我们表明这种拓扑三分量配对状态可以在相当大的参数范围内稳定。我们的结果表明，即使存在相当大的 $s$ 波配对成分，扭曲的双层铜酸盐也可以保持手性和拓扑结构。

title: Modern Approach to Orbital Hall Effect Based on Wannier Picture of Solids
abstract: In the field of orbital dynamics and orbital transport, a particularly important quantity is the so-called orbital Hall conductivity (OHC), which is expressed in terms of operators of velocity and orbital angular momentum (OAM). To overcome the difficulties in treating the unbounded position operator, very often atom-centered approximations are used, which capture only a part of the local contributions to the OAM operator. Here, we promote a new approach to quantify the OAM operator in the basis of Wannier functions, which is based on the modern theory of orbital magnetization and which captures both local and itinerant contributions to the OHC. By performing first-principles calculations for various materials, we show that significant corrections to the OHC by non-local effects arise when compared to common approximations. Our approach improves the understanding of the OAM in solids and allows for a precise estimation of various orbital effects in complex materials.
summary: 在轨道动力学和轨道输运领域，一个特别重要的量是所谓的轨道霍尔电导率（OHC），它用速度和轨道角动量（OAM）算子来表达。为了克服处理无界位置算子的困难，通常使用以原子为中心的近似，其仅捕获对 OAM 算子的局部贡献的一部分。在这里，我们提出了一种在 Wannier 函数的基础上量化 OAM 算子的新方法，该方法基于现代轨道磁化理论，并且捕获了 OHC 的局部和流动贡献。通过对各种材料进行第一性原理计算，我们发现与常见的近似值相比，非局部效应对 OHC 进行了显着修正。我们的方法提高了对固体中 OAM 的理解，并允许精确估计复杂材料中的各种轨道效应。

title: Orbital-Selective $d$-wave Superconductivity in the Two-Band $t$-$J$ Model: Possible Applications to La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$
abstract: We investigate superconductivity in a two-band $t$-$J$ model consisting of an itinerant orbital (orbital-0) and a quasi-localized orbital (orbital-1) using variational Monte Carlo. A robust orbital-selective $d$-wave superconducting state is found to emerge exclusively from the itinerant orbital. An analysis of the superexchange energy hierarchy shows that the quasi-localized orbital-1 competes with superconductivity by favoring local inter-orbital bound states, which act as energy defects and disrupt phase coherence. Consistently, the superconducting order parameter is monotonically suppressed as the occupancy of orbital-1 increases. Motivated by superconductivity in nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, these results highlight the essential role of multi-orbital physics beyond the single-band $t$-$J$ framework and point to a concrete route to enhance $T_c$: suppressing the involvement of localized $d_{z^2}$-derived orbitals.
summary: 我们使用变分蒙特卡罗研究了由巡回轨道（orbital-0）和准定域轨道（orbital-1）组成的双带 $t$-$J$ 模型中的超导性。人们发现，强大的轨道选择性 $d$ 波超导态仅从巡回轨道中出现。对超交换能量层次的分析表明，准局域轨道 1 通过支持局部轨道间束缚态来与超导性竞争，这些束缚态充当能量缺陷并破坏相位相干性。一致地，随着轨道 1 占据的增加，超导有序参数被单调抑制。受镍酸盐 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ 超导性的推动，这些结果强调了单能带 $t$-$J$ 框架之外的多轨道物理的重要作用，并指出了增强 $T_c$ 的具体途径：抑制局域 $d_{z^2}$ 衍生轨道的参与。

title: Controlling the rain fall statistics using Mean-Reverting Jump Diffusion model
abstract: We present a stochastic mean-reverting jump-diffusion model to simulate rainfall time series and validate it using long-term half-hourly rain fall data from the North-East region of India. The model captures the intermittent and extreme-event dynamics of rainfall, reproducing superdiffusive behavior with an exponent $\sim 1.8$, along with the observed probability distributions and multifractal features. By systematically varying key parameters, we demonstrate a transition between Log-Normal and Gamma distributions, and show how the occurrence of extreme events and dry-patch durations can be controlled. Spectral and wavelet analyses further confirm that the simulated series reproduces the dominant temporal scales observed in real rainfall data. Our proposed framework provides a robust tool for generating realistic synthetic rainfall series and serves as an effective approach for understanding the influence of underlying stochastic processes that governs the rainfall statistics.
summary: 我们提出了一种随机均值回归跳跃扩散模型来模拟降雨时间序列，并使用印度东北地区的长期半小时降雨数据对其进行验证。该模型捕捉降雨的间歇性和极端事件动态，再现指数 $\sim 1.8$ 的超扩散行为，以及观察到的概率分布和多重分形特征。通过系统地改变关键参数，我们演示了对数正态分布和伽玛分布之间的转变，并展示了如何控制极端事件的发生和干旱持续时间。频谱和小波分析进一步证实，模拟序列再现了真实降雨数据中观察到的主要时间尺度。我们提出的框架提供了一个强大的工具来生成真实的合成降雨系列，并作为理解控制降雨统计的潜在随机过程的影响的有效方法。

title: Harmonic morphisms and dynamical invariants in network renormalization
abstract: Renormalization of complex networks requires principled criteria for assessing whether a coarse-graining preserves dynamical content. We prove that discrete harmonic morphisms -- surjective maps preserving harmonic functions -- provide the minimal condition under which random walks on a fine-grained network project exactly onto random walks on its coarse-grained image, through an appropriate random time change. We formalize this via the harmonic degree, a diagnostic quantifying how closely any network coarse-graining approximates a harmonic morphism. Applying this framework to geometric, Laplacian, and GNN-based renormalization across real-world networks, we find that each method produces a distinct dynamical fingerprint encoding its underlying physical assumptions. Most strikingly, Laplacian renormalization spontaneously yields exact harmonic morphisms in several networks, achieving exact preservation of first-exit random-walk transition structure at specific scales, a property that entropic susceptibility fails to detect. Our results identify a discrete analog of diffusion-preserving conformal maps for irregular network topologies and provide quantitative tools for designing and evaluating multi-scale network descriptions.
summary:
复杂网络的重整化需要原则性标准来评估粗粒度是否保留动态内容。我们证明，离散调和态射（保留调和函数的满射映射）提供了最小条件，在该条件下，细粒度网络上的随机游走通过适当的随机时间变化精确地投影到其粗粒度图像上的随机游走。我们通过调和度将其形式化，调和度是一种诊断量化任何网络粗粒度近似调和态射的程度。将该框架应用于现实世界网络中的几何、拉普拉斯和基于 GNN 的重整化，我们发现每种方法都会产生独特的动态指纹，编码其基本的物理假设。最引人注目的是，拉普拉斯重整化在多个网络中自发地产生精确的调和态射，从而在特定尺度上实现了首出口随机游走过渡结构的精确保存，这是熵敏感性无法检测到的属性。

我们的结果确定了不规则网络拓扑的扩散保持共形映射的离散模拟，并为设计和评估多尺度网络描述提供了定量工具。

title: Revealing the nature of the charge density wave order of ErTe$_3$ via Raman scattering under anisotropic strain
abstract: The nature of charge density wave (CDW) order parameter of the tritelluride ErTe$_3$ is investigated by polarization-resolved Raman scattering under anisotropic strain. We show that the CDW amplitude mode can be used to track the mirror-symmetry breakings associated with the CDW order. The mirror-symmetry breakings are found to track each other as a function of strain and temperature arguing against the recently proposed ferro-axial multi-component order. Instead, we show that a single component CDW order parameter with an ordering wavevector tilted away from the principle crystallographic axis can reproduce the observed mirror symmetry breakings and their manifestation in the symmetry-resolved Raman spectra.
summary: 通过各向异性应变下的偏振分辨拉曼散射研究了三碲化物ErTe$_3$的电荷密度波(CDW)有序参数的性质。我们证明 CDW 振幅模式可用于跟踪与 CDW 阶次相关的镜像对称破缺。人们发现镜面对称断裂作为应变和温度的函数相互追踪，这与最近提出的铁轴多组分顺序相矛盾。相反，我们表明，具有远离主晶轴倾斜的有序波矢量的单分量 CDW 有序参数可以重现观察到的镜面对称破缺及其在对称分辨拉曼光谱中的表现。

title: Holographic Krylov Complexity for Charged, Composite and Extended Probes
abstract: We study the holographic spread/Krylov complexity of operators with non-trivial internal structure and of genuinely extended operators. We first consider a massive particle in AdS$_5\times S^5$ carrying conserved $R$-charge, and show how motion in the internal space modifies the complexity growth, yielding a natural holographic realisation of symmetry-resolved Krylov complexity. We then move to probes that are effectively pointlike from the field-theory viewpoint but possess an intrinsic structure in the bulk: baryon-vertex configurations and giant gravitons. Our results indicate that, for this broad class of structured but pointlike probes, the leading large-time behaviour retains the characteristic form expected for local operators in conformal theories, while the internal structure and induced charges produce informative subleading effects. We also study a genuinely extended probe, a fundamental string falling in AdS while stretched along a spatial direction, as a model for the spread complexity of a non-local operator. In this case, although the leading behaviour still exhibits the expected growth pattern, the subleading terms and intermediate regimes differ qualitatively from those of pointlike probes. This provides concrete evidence that extended operators carry a finer notion of spread complexity, sensitive to their spatial structure. Our results broaden the class of probes for which holographic Krylov complexity can be analysed explicitly, clarify which features are universal and which depend on the nature of the operator, and open a promising route toward a sharper field-theory understanding of complexity for charged, composite and extended excitations.
summary:
我们研究具有重要内部结构的算子和真正扩展算子的全息扩展/Krylov 复杂度。我们首先考虑 AdS$_5\times S^5$ 中携带守恒 $R$ 电荷的大质量粒子，并展示内部空间中的运动如何改变复杂性的增长，从而产生对称解析 Krylov 复杂性的自然全息实现。然后，我们转向从场论角度来看实际上是点状的探测器，但在整体上具有内在结构：重子顶点配置和巨型引力子。我们的结果表明，对于这一类广泛的结构化但点状的探针，领先的大时间行为保留了共形理论中局部算子预期的特征形式，而内部结构和感应电荷产生了信息丰富的次领先效应。我们还研究了真正扩展的探针，即落在 AdS 中的基本弦，同时沿空间方向拉伸，作为非局部算子的扩展复杂性的模型。

在这种情况下，尽管主导行为仍然表现出预期的增长模式，但次主导项和中间机制与点状探针的行为有质的不同。这提供了具体的证据，表明扩展算子具有更精细的扩展复杂性概念，对其空间结构敏感。我们的研究结果拓宽了可以明确分析全息克雷洛夫复杂度的探针类别，阐明哪些特征是通用的，哪些特征取决于算子的性质，并为更清晰地理解带电、复合和扩展激发的复杂性开辟了一条有希望的道路。

title: A Duality Web for Non-Supersymmetric Strings
abstract: Motivated by the recently proposed geometric descriptions of 0A and 0B in M-theory and F-theory, we propose a web of duality among non-supersymmetric strings. In particular we argue that the distinct $\mathbb{Z}_2$ quotients of M-theory on $S^1\vee S^1$ lead to both 0A orientifolds as well as non-supersymmetric 10d heterotic vacua of the E-type, including the tachyon-free $SO(16)\times SO(16)$ strings. Moreover we identify certain $\mathbb{Z}_2$ quotients of F-theory on $(S^1\vee S^1)\times S^1$ with 0B orientifolds (including a tachyon-free model) as well as others with dual to non-supersymmetric heterotic strings of the D-type. Moreover using this picture we resolve some puzzles and provide further evidence for the Bergman-Gaberdiel duality between a particular 0B orientifold in 10 dimensions and the Narain compactification of 26-dimensional bosonic strings on a 16-dimensional torus, as well as the DMS conjecture of a 0A orientifold duality in 10d with a bosonic string orientifold of a Narain compactification to 10d.
summary: 受最近提出的 M 理论和 F 理论中 0A 和 0B 的几何描述的启发，我们提出了非超对称弦之间的对偶性网络。特别是，我们认为 M 理论在 $S^1\vee S^1$ 上的不同 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 商导致 0A 东方折叠以及 E 型的非超对称 10d 杂变真空，包括无快子的 $SO(16)\times SO(16)$ 弦。此外，我们在 $(S^1\vee S^1)\times S^1$ 上识别出 F 理论的某些 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 商，具有 0B 方向褶皱（包括无快子模型），以及其他具有 D 型对偶到非超对称异质串的商。此外，使用这张图片，我们解决了一些难题，并为 10 维中特定的 0B 东方折叠与 16 维环面上 26 维玻色弦的 Narain 紧化之间的 Bergman-Gaberdiel 对偶性提供了进一步的证据，以及 10d 中的 0A 东方折叠对偶性与 Narain 压缩到 10d 的玻色弦东方折叠的 DMS 猜想。

title: Resurgence of high-energy string amplitudes
abstract: We analyze the fixed-angle high-energy ($\alpha' \to \infty$) structure of $n$-point tree-level string amplitudes from complementary perspectives: locally via saddle-point expansions, algebraically via difference equations and their asymptotic structure, analytically via Aomoto-Gauss-Manin connection and Mellin-Barnes representation, and geometrically via twisted intersection theory and Lefschetz thimbles. Using, in turn, saddle-point analysis and finite-difference equations in the kinematic variables, we show that the perturbative coefficients in the resulting asymptotic series in $1/\alpha'$ are organized by Bernoulli-number data, rather than by the multiple zeta values characteristic of the low-energy $\alpha' \to 0$ regime. Resurgence theory allows upgrading these divergent series to transseries whose Stokes data capture the analytic continuation between unphysical and physical kinematic regions in the form of non-perturbative monodromy contributions. We derive the transseries for four-point open string amplitudes explicitly. We also construct a differential and Mellin formulation which place their low- and high-energy expansions in a common analytic framework and unifies them as asymptotic sectors of the same underlying object. We extend the difference-equation analysis to $n \geq 5$, where it yields perturbative high-energy asymptotic expansions and leads naturally to a higher-rank connection problem. Finally, translating our asymptotic analysis into the language of twisted de Rham theory, we derive an alternative double-copy representation of the high-energy limit of closed-string amplitudes in terms of Lefschetz thimbles for any $n$.
summary:
我们从互补的角度分析了$n$点树级弦振幅的固定角度高能（$\alpha' \to \infty$）结构：局部通过鞍点展开，代数上通过差分方程及其渐近结构，分析上通过Aomoto-Gauss-Manin连接和Mellin-Barnes表示，几何上通过扭曲相交理论和Lefschetz顶针。依次使用鞍点分析和运动学变量中的有限差分方程，我们表明 $1/\alpha'$ 中所得渐近级数中的微扰系数是由伯努利数数据组织的，而不是由低能量 $\alpha' \to 0$ 状态的多个 zeta 值特征组织的。复兴理论允许将这些发散序列升级为跨序列，其斯托克斯数据以非微扰单向贡献的形式捕获非物理和物理运动区域之间的分析延续。我们明确推导出四点开弦振幅的跨系列。

我们还构建了微分和梅林公式，将它们的低能和高能展开式置于共同的分析框架中，并将它们统一为同一基础对象的渐近扇区。我们将差分方程分析扩展到 $n \geq 5$，它会产生扰动的高能渐近展开式，并自然地导致更高阶的连接问题。最后，将我们的渐近分析转化为扭曲德拉姆理论的语言，我们得出了闭弦振幅高能极限的另一种双拷贝表示，以任何 $n$ 的 Lefschetz 顶针表示。

title: The $\mathcal{N}=1$ Super-Grassmannian for CFT$_3$ and a Foray on AdS and Cosmological Correlators
abstract: We construct a Super-Grassmannian integral representation for $n-$point functions in $\mathcal{N}=1$ SCFT$_3$. In this formalism, conformal invariance, supersymmetry, and special superconformal invariance are implemented manifestly through (operator-valued) delta function constraints. An important feature of this framework is the fact that we obtain simple algebraic relations among component correlators, which enable us to determine any component correlator in terms of just one of the component correlators. In particular, this formalism enables us to construct (A)dS$_4$ boundary correlators with contact diagrams from those that receive contributions purely from particle exchanges. We illustrate this by determining the (A)dS$_4$ Yang-Mills gluon four-point function from its gluino counterpart. Further, we establish the flat-space limit in super-space, finding a perfect agreement with existing flat-space results.
summary: 我们为 $\mathcal{N}=1$ SCFT$_3$ 中的 $n-$点函数构建超格拉斯曼积分表示。在这种形式中，共形不变性、超对称性和特殊的超共形不变性显然是通过（算子值）delta 函数约束来实现的。该框架的一个重要特征是我们获得了分量相关器之间的简单代数关系，这使我们能够仅根据一个分量相关器来确定任何分量相关器。特别是，这种形式主义使我们能够利用纯粹从粒子交换接收贡献的接触图构建 (A)dS$_4$ 边界相关器。我们通过从其对应的胶子确定 (A)dS$_4$ Yang-Mills 胶子四点函数来说明这一点。此外，我们建立了超级空间中的平坦空间极限，与现有的平坦空间结果完美吻合。

title: Quantum Fluctuations and Newton-Cartan Geometry for Non-Relativistic de Sitter space
abstract: We study a non-relativistic realisation of two-dimensional de Sitter gravity both from its boundary and bulk description with the goal of learning about de Sitter space and paving the way for extending the holographic duality into a non-relativistic direction. On the boundary side, we analyse the Schwarzian-type boundary action associated with non-relativistic de Sitter gravity and evaluate its one-loop partition function in order to compute its quantum fluctuations. Rather than relying on the coadjoint-orbit construction, we derive the path integral measure directly from the action using the Ostrogradsky formalism. We find a temperature-dependent prefactor scaling as $T^2$, of which the power agrees with the counting of the four global symmetry generators present. On the bulk side, we construct the corresponding torsionless Newton-Cartan geometry and show that it satisfies the equations of motion of a non-relativistic JT-like action and uplift the geometry to a three-dimensional Lorentzian geometry.
summary: 我们从边界和体描述两方面研究二维德西特引力的非相对论实现，目的是了解德西特空间并为将全息对偶性扩展到非相对论方向铺平道路。在边界方面，我们分析了与非相对论德西特引力相关的施瓦茨型边界作用，并评估其单环配分函数以计算其量子涨落。我们不依赖共交轨道构造，而是使用奥斯特罗格拉茨基形式主义直接从作用中导出路径积分测度。我们发现与温度相关的前因子缩放为 $T^2$，其功率与存在的四个全局对称生成器的计数一致。在体积方面，我们构造了相应的无扭牛顿-嘉当几何，并证明它满足非相对论类 JT 作用的运动方程，并将几何提升为三维洛伦兹几何。

title: Decoding multiway gravitational junctions in AdS in terms of holographic quantum maps
abstract: It has been shown that multiway junctions gluing $n$ copies of locally AdS$_3$ spacetimes ($n\geq 2$) can be described by $n-1$ strings obeying non-linear Nambu-Goto equations coupled by Monge-Ampère like terms. Here we study how such junctions along with their stringy degrees of freedom can be interpreted in terms of an interface between $n$ identical holographic conformal theories each defined on a semi-infinite line (wire). We study the gravitational scattering problem at the multiway junction, and show that at the linearized order the dual interfaces correspond to quantum maps which factorize into a product of a scattering matrix determined only by the tension of the dual junction and relative automorphisms of the Virasoro algebra governed by the $n-1$ stringy modes. Both of these are universal in the sense that they are independent of linear modifications of the background state. These generalize earlier results for the 2-way junctions implying that the dual interface is a tunable energy transmitter. We comment on understanding the quantum map corresponding to the full non-linear gravitational problem, and study Ward identities and unitarity bounds.
summary: 已经表明，粘合局部 AdS$_3$ 时空的 $n$ 副本 ($n\geq 2$) 的多路连接点可以通过遵守由 Monge-Ampère 等项耦合的非线性 Nambu-Goto 方程的 $n-1$ 字符串来描述。在这里，我们研究如何用 $n$ 个相同的全息共形理论之间的接口来解释这些结点及其弦自由度，每个理论都定义在半无限线（导线）上。我们研究了多路结处的引力散射问题，并表明在线性化顺序下，双界面对应于量子图，该量子图分解为仅由双结处的张力和受 $n-1$ 弦模式控制的 Virasoro 代数的相对自同构决定的散射矩阵的乘积。这两者都是通用的，因为它们独立于背景状态的线性修改。这些概括了 2 路连接点的早期结果，表明双接口是可调谐能量发射器。我们评论了理解与完全非线性引力问题相对应的量子图，并研究了沃德恒等式和幺正性界限。

title: From Matrix Models to Gaussian Molecules and the Einstein-Hilbert Action
abstract: A matrix model on a D-dimensional Euclidean space is introduced as a generalization of random matrix models and as a non-perturbative definition of discretized closed string theory. The free energy of the matrix model is formally derived to all orders in string perturbation expansion and shown to be given in terms of invariant graph polynomials, whose coefficients enumerate ribbon graphs and are a refinement of the generalized Catalan numbers. The vacuum diagrams contributing to the free energy are found to be related to Gaussian molecules, known from the study of polymer structures. Coupling the matrix field to a curved background with Riemannian metric yields a non-perturbative definition of discretized string theory on this background. No on-shell condition for the metric is required to arrive at the free energy. Rather, it is shown that the free energy of the matrix model is the Einstein-Hilbert action with cosmological constant term. The gravitational and the cosmological constants are both formally determined to all orders in the string perturbation expansion. In fact, they are explicitly given by the expectation value of a particular graph invariant. Introducing a vector field, minimally coupled to a background gauge field, provides a discretized open-closed string theory, leading to the Yang-Mills action as well as intrinsic and extrinsic curvature terms.
summary:
引入 D 维欧几里得空间上的矩阵模型作为随机矩阵模型的推广和离散闭弦理论的非微扰定义。矩阵模型的自由能形式上导出为弦扰动展开中的所有阶，并显示为以不变图多项式的形式给出，其系数枚举带状图，并且是广义加泰罗尼亚数的细化。通过对聚合物结构的研究，发现对自由能有贡献的真空图与高斯分子有关。使用黎曼度量将矩阵场耦合到弯曲背景，得出在此背景下离散弦理论的非微扰定义。无需任何壳内条件即可获得自由能。相反，它表明矩阵模型的自由能是具有宇宙学常数项的爱因斯坦-希尔伯特作用。引力常数和宇宙学常数均由弦微扰展开中的所有阶数形式确定。事实上，它们是由特定图不变量的期望值明确给出的。

引入与背景规范场最小耦合的矢量场，提供了离散开闭弦理论，导致杨-米尔斯作用以及内在和外在曲率项。

title: Super-Grassmannians for $\mathcal{N}=2$ to $4$ SCFT$_3$: From AdS$_4$ Correlators to $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM scattering Amplitudes
abstract: We construct a Super-Grassmannian for $n-$point functions in $\mathcal{N}=2$ to $4$ SCFT$_3$. The constraints imposed by super-conformal invariance and $R-$symmetry are completely manifest in this formalism through (operator-valued) delta functions. We test our formalism in $\mathcal{N}=2$ and $\mathcal{N}=4$ AdS$_4$ super Yang-Mills theories. In the $\mathcal{N}=2$ case, for instance, we reproduce the four-gluon correlator using the four-point scalar correlator as input. For $\mathcal{N}=4$, we construct the super-operator in two distinct ways. In one approach, the super-operator has a lowest component of spin zero and includes all states up to spin two. In the other approach, we build the super-operator in a CPT self-conjugate manner, which contains only operators with spin zero, spin half, and spin one mimicking flat space $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM super-field constructions. The latter construction is particularly interesting, as it matches directly with the $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM amplitudes in the flat space limit, thereby demonstrating the non-triviality and usefulness of our framework. It is interesting to note that the $R-$symmetry group enhances from $SO(\mathcal{N})$ to $SU(\mathcal{N})$ in the flat space limit.
summary:
我们为 $\mathcal{N}=2$ 到 $4$ SCFT$_3$ 中的 $n-$ 点函数构造一个超格拉斯曼函数。超共形不变性和$R-$对称性所施加的约束通过（算子值）delta 函数在这种形式主义中完全体现出来。我们在 $\mathcal{N}=2$ 和 $\mathcal{N}=4$ AdS$_4$ 超级杨米尔斯理论中测试我们的形式主义。例如，在 $\mathcal{N}=2$ 的情况下，我们使用四点标量相关器作为输入来重现四胶子相关器。对于 $\mathcal{N}=4$，我们以两种不同的方式构造超级运算符。在一种方法中，超级算子具有自旋零的最低分量并且包括直到自旋二的所有状态。在另一种方法中，我们以 CPT 自共轭方式构建超级算子，其中仅包含具有自旋零、自旋一半和自旋一的算子，模仿平坦空间 $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM 超场结构。后一种结构特别有趣，因为它与平坦空间极限中的 $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM 振幅直接匹配，从而证明了我们框架的非平凡性和有用性。

有趣的是，$R-$对称群在平坦空间限制中从 $SO(\mathcal{N})$ 增强到 $SU(\mathcal{N})$。

title: Compactifying the Sen Action: Six Dimensions
abstract: The Sen action for self-dual fields has been generalised by Hull to include two metrics which allows it to be defined on generic manifolds. In this paper we consider Kaluza-Klein compactifications of this action. The existence of two metrics presents novel challenges as there are two Kaluza-Klein towers of fields. We show that to find a consistent truncation one must include zero-modes associated to each of the two towers. Although this naively leads to a doubling of the massless degrees of freedom we show that on-shell this is not the case. We also discuss a deformation of the Sen action to include an additional form-field but which does not lead to new degrees of freedom on-shell but which arises naturally upon compactification.
summary: 自对偶场的 Sen 作用已被 Hull 概括为包括两个度量，使其可以在通用流形上定义。在本文中，我们考虑该作用的 Kaluza-Klein 紧凑化。由于存在两个 Kaluza-Klein 场塔，因此两个度量的存在提出了新的挑战。我们证明，要找到一致的截断，必须包括与两座塔中每一座塔相关的零模式。尽管这天真地导致无质量自由度加倍，但我们表明在壳上情况并非如此。我们还讨论了 Sen 作用的变形，以包括附加的形状场，但这不会导致壳上新的自由度，而是在压缩时自然出现。

title: On the Uniqueness of Ghost-Free Multi-Gravity -- II: Constraining antisymmetrised multi spin-2 interactions
abstract: So far, only a single theory of multiple spin-2 fields is known that features genuine multi-field interactions while remaining free of Boulware-Deser-type ghost instabilities. In this paper we show that this is the most general ghost-free multi spin-2 interaction type possible. We start with the general class of multivielbein interactions containing antisymmetrised products of vielbeins, considered earlier by Hinterbichler and Rosen. We formulate a necessary condition for these theories to be ghost-free. For two vielbeins the theory parameters remain unrestricted, reproducing the ghost-free bimetric theory. But for more than two vielbeins with genuine multi-field interactions, we show that the couplings are restricted precisely to yield the known ghost-free multivielbein theory, thus establishing its uniqueness. We also show that more general interactions, constructed using the ghost-free bimetric and multivielbein potentials as building blocks, satisfy the necessary ghost-free conditions provided the associated interaction graphs have a tree structure.
summary: 到目前为止，仅已知一种多自旋 2 场理论，该理论具有真正的多场相互作用，同时又不存在 Boulware-Deser 型幽灵不稳定性。在本文中，我们证明这是最常见的无重影多自旋 2 相互作用类型。我们从包含 Vielbeins 反对称产物的一般类别的 multivielbein 相互作用开始，这是 Hinterbichler 和 Rosen 早些时候考虑的。我们提出了这些理论没有幽灵的必要条件。对于两个 vielbeins，理论参数保持不受限制，再现了无重影双计量理论。但对于两个以上具有真正多场相互作用的 Vielbein 来说，我们证明耦合受到精确限制，从而产生了已知的无鬼多重 Vielbein 理论，从而确立了其独特性。我们还表明，使用无重影双度量和多重势势作为构建块构建的更一般的相互作用，只要相关的交互图具有树结构，就满足必要的无重影条件。

title: Vacuum-induced current density from a magnetic flux threading a cosmic dispiration in $(D+1)$-dimensional spacetime
abstract: We investigate the vacuum-induced current density for a charged scalar field in a $(D+1)$-dimensional cosmic dispiration spacetime threaded by a magnetic flux. This background combines a cosmic string and a screw dislocation, yielding a nontrivial helical geometry. By constructing the normalized mode functions of the Klein--Gordon equation, we evaluate the Wightman function and obtain the vacuum expectation value of the current density. We show that, in addition to the azimuthal component describing a persistent current around the defect, a nonvanishing axial component is induced as a direct consequence of the helical structure of the spacetime. Both components are periodic functions of the magnetic flux, depending only on its fractional part, reflecting the Aharonov--Bohm nature of the effect. Closed expressions are obtained for both massive and massless fields in arbitrary dimensions. We demonstrate that the screw dislocation parameter plays a crucial role in the behavior of the induced currents, leading to the regularization of the axial component at the origin and controlling its magnitude. The asymptotic behavior of both components is analyzed in detail. Our results reduce to known expressions in the absence of the screw dislocation, providing a consistency check. In particular, we examine the physically relevant $(3+1)$-dimensional case, where numerical analysis reveals nontrivial features arising from the interplay between topology and gauge effects.
summary:
我们研究了由磁通量穿过的 $(D+1)$ 维宇宙扩散时空中带电标量场的真空感应电流密度。该背景结合了宇宙弦和螺旋位错，产生了非平凡的螺旋几何形状。通过构造Klein--Gordon方程的归一化模态函数，对Wightman函数进行求值，得到电流密度的真空期望值。我们表明，除了描述缺陷周围持续电流的方位角分量之外，还引入了非零轴向分量作为时空螺旋结构的直接结果。两个分量都是磁通量的周期函数，仅取决于其小数部分，反映了该效应的阿哈罗诺夫-玻姆性质。对于任意维度的有质量场和无质量场都可以获得闭合表达式。我们证明，螺旋位错参数在感应电流的行为中起着至关重要的作用，导致原点处的轴向分量的规则化并控制其大小。详细分析了两个分量的渐近行为。

在没有螺旋位错的情况下，我们的结果简化为已知表达式，从而提供了一致性检查。特别是，我们检查了物理相关的 $(3+1)$ 维情况，其中数值分析揭示了拓扑和规范效应之间相互作用所产生的重要特征。

title: Gaussian pseudogauge invariant hydrodynamics with spin
abstract: Extending the Gaussian covariant hydrodynamics approach [1] using torsion as an auxiliary field we formulate a fluctuating hydrodynamics with spin which is covariant with respect to pseudo-gauge transformations as well as generally covariant with respect to foliations. This is done via the second order gravitational Ward identities, derived here in the torsionful case. This ensures that, while angular momentum observables depend covariantly on the pseudo-gauge, the dynamics is pseudo-gauge independent, thus clarifying the role of the pseudo-gauge in hydrodynamics with spin
summary: 使用扭转作为辅助场扩展高斯协变流体动力学方法[1]，我们制定了带有自旋的脉动流体动力学，该流体动力学相对于伪规范变换是协变的，并且相对于叶状结构通常是协变的。这是通过二阶引力 Ward 恒等式来完成的，该恒等式是在扭转情况下导出的。这确保了，虽然角动量可观测量协变地依赖于伪规范，但动力学是与伪规范无关的，从而阐明了伪规范在具有自旋的流体动力学中的作用

authors.name: Mariana Julia Pereira Dos Dores Savioli

featured_authors.name: Mariana Julia Pereira Dos Dores Savioli

title: Linearized Q-Ball Perturbations
abstract: Linearized deformations of the thick-walled (low-amplitude) (1+1)-dimensional Q-ball may be decomposed into relativistic modes, which are roughly plane waves, and also long-wavelength corotating and counterrotating Floquet modes. Each mode oscillates at a pair of mirror frequencies which average to the Q-ball frequency. The corotating modes are those of a breather or oscillon plus a very loosely bound mode. The counterrotating modes are described by an irrational-level Pöschl-Teller potential, with two discrete modes which mix with their unbound mirrors, unbinding them and turning them into Feshbach-type quasinormal modes. Expanding to leading order in the Q-ball amplitude, we present all of these modes in closed form, except for the bound mode which does not exist at leading order.
summary: 厚壁（低振幅）（1+1）维Q球的线性变形可以分解为相对论模式，其大致为平面波，以及长波长同向旋转和反向旋转Floquet模式。每种模式以一对镜像频率振荡，该镜像频率平均为 Q 球频率。共转模式是呼吸器或振荡模式加上非常松散的束缚模式。反向旋转模式由无理级 Pöschl-Teller 势来描述，具有两种离散模式，它们与未束缚的镜子混合，解除它们的束缚并将它们转变为 Feshbach 型准正规模式。扩展到 Q 球振幅的前导阶，我们以封闭形式呈现所有这些模式，除了在前导阶不存在的束缚模式。

title: Geometric Phases and Persistent Spin Currents from nonminimal couplings
abstract: We investigate a class of nonminimal derivative couplings between fermions and electromagnetic fields that generate Rashba-like spin--orbit interactions in one-dimensional quantum rings. Starting from a generalized Dirac Lagrangian containing two independent axial structures built from the field strength $F_{\mu\nu}$ and its dual $\tilde{F}_{\mu\nu}$, we perform a systematic nonrelativistic expansion and show that both couplings induce effective Hamiltonians of the form $\boldsymbol{\mathcal{F}}\cdot(\boldsymbol{p}\times\boldsymbol{\sigma})$. This reveals that magnetic as well as electric background fields may give rise to Rashba-type interactions, in contrast with standard condensed-matter scenarios. Before passing to the nonrelativistic limit, we analyze the relativistic content of the model in detail: the canonical structure of the deformed Dirac operator, the admissible background classes, the effective bilinear current, and the branch splitting of the relativistic dispersion relation, which constitutes the primary relativistic signature of the theory. We derive exact analytical energy levels and normalized eigenspinors for the resulting ring Hamiltonian, compute Aharonov--Anandan geometric phases, and analyze persistent spin currents together with the associated differential spin response $\mathcal{G}_s = \partial\mathcal{J}_\varphi^z/\partial\xi$. Exploiting the analytical control offered by the model, we derive the first systematic order-of-magnitude bounds on the two Lorentz-invariant couplings $\mathfrak{g}_1$ and $\mathfrak{g}_2$ from both spectroscopic and mesoscopic scenarios, identifying the experimental channels most sensitive to the new physics encoded in these operators. We discuss physical implications, signatures, and possible experimental analogs, and outline several promising directions involving disorder, noise, and nonequilibrium spin dynamics.
summary:
我们研究了费米子和电磁场之间的一类非最小导数耦合，这些耦合在一维量子环中产生类似 Rashba 的自旋轨道相互作用。从包含由场强 $F_{\mu\nu}$ 及其对偶 $\tilde{F}_{\mu\nu}$ 构建的两个独立轴向结构的广义狄拉克拉格朗日函数开始，我们进行了系统的非相对论展开，并表明这两种耦合都会产生 $\boldsymbol{\mathcal{F}}\cdot(\boldsymbol{p}\times\boldsymbol{\sigma})$ 形式的有效哈密顿量。这表明，与标准凝聚态物质场景相反，磁场和电场背景场可能会引起拉什巴型相互作用。在进入非相对论极限之前，我们详细分析了模型的相对论内容：变形狄拉克算子的规范结构、允许的背景类、有效双线性电流以及构成理论主要相对论特征的相对论色散关系的分支分裂。

我们为所得的环哈密顿量导出精确的分析能级和归一化本征旋量，计算阿哈罗诺夫-阿南丹几何相位，并分析持续自旋电流以及相关的微分自旋响应 $\mathcal{G}_s = \partial\mathcal{J}_\varphi^z/\partial\xi$。利用模型提供的分析控制，我们从光谱和介观场景中推导出两个洛伦兹不变耦合 $\mathfrak{g}_1$ 和 $\mathfrak{g}_2$ 上的第一个系统数量级界限，识别对这些算子中编码的新物理最敏感的实验通道。我们讨论了物理含义、特征和可能的实验类似物，并概述了涉及无序、噪声和非平衡自旋动力学的几个有希望的方向。

title: Integrals of motion in $WE_6$ CFT and the ODE/IM correspondence
abstract: We study the ODE/IM correspondence for the ordinary differential equation associated with the affine Lie algebra $E_6^{(1)}$. The WKB expansion of the solution of the ODE is performed by the diagonalization method, and the period integrals of the WKB coefficients along the Pochhammer contour are calculated. We also compute the integrals of motion on a cylinder in two-dimensional conformal field theory with W-symmetry associated with $E_6^{(1)}$. Their eigenvalues on the highest-weight state are shown to agree with the period integrals up to the sixth order.
summary: 我们研究与仿射李代数 $E_6^{(1)}$ 相关的常微分方程的 ODE/IM 对应关系。通过对角化方法对常微分方程的解进行 WKB 展开，并计算 WKB 系数沿 Pochhammer 轮廓的周期积分。我们还计算二维共形场论中圆柱体上运动的积分，W 对称性与 $E_6^{(1)}$ 相关。它们在最高权重状态上的特征值与六阶以下的周期积分一致。

title: Rindler Physics with a UV Cutoff on the Lattice
abstract: We investigate quantum field theory in Rindler space with a UV cutoff by considering a free scalar field on a lattice in Rindler coordinates. We find that the Minkowski vacuum is not exactly thermal with respect to the local lattice Rindler Hamiltonian. Nevertheless, for observables sufficiently far from the horizon, the Wightman function and the Unruh--DeWitt detector response reproduce the expected thermal behavior in the continuum limit. Thus, the Unruh effect survives operationally, even though exact thermality is lost at the state level. We also show that the Rindler vacuum energy density reproduces the standard continuum behavior away from the horizon, while the UV singularity at the horizon is replaced by a stretched-horizon contribution. Furthermore, the retarded Green function exhibits a component reflected at the stretched horizon, implying that an ingoing wave packet is reflected at a proper distance of order the cutoff. This provides an effective brick-wall picture in the UV-regulated theory. Our analysis suggests that, once a cutoff is introduced, the global Minkowski description and the wedge description based on a local Rindler Hamiltonian are no longer equivalent at the operator level.
summary:
我们通过考虑 Rindler 坐标中晶格上的自由标量场来研究具有 UV 截止的 Rindler 空间中的量子场论。我们发现，相对于局域晶格 Rindler 哈密顿量，闵可夫斯基真空并不完全是热的。然而，对于距离地平线足够远的可观测物体，怀特曼函数和 Unruh-DeWitt 探测器响应再现了连续极限内的预期热行为。因此，尽管在州一级失去了精确的热度，但安鲁效应在操作上仍然存在。我们还表明，Rindler 真空能量密度再现了远离视界的标准连续行为，而视界处的紫外奇点则被拉伸视界的贡献所取代。此外，延迟的格林函数表现出在拉伸视界处反射的分量，这意味着入射波包在截止点的适当距离处被反射。这为紫外线调节理论提供了一幅有效的砖墙图。

我们的分析表明，一旦引入截止，全局 Minkowski 描述和基于局部 Rindler 哈密顿量的楔形描述在算子级别就不再等效。

title: Classification of Pati--Salam Asymmetric $\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$ Heterotic String Orbifolds
abstract: We develop a systematic classification of asymmetric $\mathbb{Z}_2$ orbifold actions in Pati--Salam heterotic string vacua constructed in the free fermionic formulation. Starting from symmetric $\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$ orbifold vacua with an $SO(10)$ GUT, we allow the Pati--Salam breaking vector to act asymmetrically on the internal degrees of freedom. The asymmetric orbifold action freezes geometrical moduli whilst inducing doublet--triplet splitting in the untwisted sector. Notably, this doublet--triplet splitting operates for any asymmetric action, including pure asymmetric shifts that preserve all geometric moduli, and is therefore independent of moduli stabilisation. Classifying the breaking vector according to its twist action, we find six inequivalent classes of geometric moduli spaces characterised by 12, 8, 4 or 0 real untwisted moduli. Through combining these asymmetric twists with all compatible asymmetric shifts, 24 inequivalent cases are identified and characterised by their residual moduli content and internal Narain lattice. For each case we construct representative basis sets admitting three chiral generations, providing the starting point for further classification within each class. We perform explicit GGSO phase enumerations in representative model classes with 12, 8, 4 and 0 moduli, classify the resulting $\mathcal{N} = 1$ and $\mathcal{N} = 0$ vacua according to phenomenological criteria and identify exophobic, phenomenologically viable models. We compute the partition function and corresponding one-loop vacuum energy at the free fermionic point in moduli space for each phenomenologically viable model across the four classes. As the number of geometrical moduli decreases, the number of distinct partition functions for these vacua collapses to a small number, reflecting a pronounced degeneracy under GGSO phase variations.
summary:
我们对在自由费米子公式中构建的 Pati-Salam 异质弦真空中的不对称 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 轨道作用进行了系统分类。从具有 $SO(10)$ GUT 的对称 $\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$ orbifold vacua 开始，我们允许 Pati--Salam 断裂向量在内部自由度上不对称地作用。不对称的轨道折叠作用冻结了几何模量，同时在未扭曲的扇区中引起双线态-三线态分裂。值得注意的是，这种二重态-三重态分裂适用于任何不对称作用，包括保留所有几何模量的纯不对称位移，因此与模量稳定性无关。根据断裂矢量的扭转作用对其进行分类，我们发现了六个不等价类的几何模量空间，其特征在于 12、8、4 或 0 实数非扭转模量。通过将这些不对称扭曲与所有兼容的不对称位移相结合，识别出 24 个不等价情况，并通过其残余模量含量和内部 Narain 晶格进行表征。

对于每种情况，我们构建了允许三个手性代的代表性基础集，为每个类别内的进一步分类提供了起点。我们在模数为 12、8、4 和 0 的代表性模型类中执行显式 GGSO 相枚举，根据现象学标准对所得的 $\mathcal{N} = 1$ 和 $\mathcal{N} = 0$ 真空进行分类，并识别外向、现象学上可行的模型。我们计算了四个类别中每个唯象可行模型的配分函数和模空间中自由费米子点处相应的单环真空能量。随着几何模数的减少，这些真空的不同配分函数的数量减少到很少，反映了 GGSO 相位变化下的明显简并性。

title: Leading low-temperature correction to the Heisenberg-Euler Lagrangian
abstract: In this note, we show that the well-known leading low-temperature correction to the Heisenberg-Euler Lagrangian in a constant electromagnetic field arising at two loops can be efficiently extracted from its one-loop zero-temperature analogue. Resorting to the real-time formalism of equilibrium quantum field theory that explicitly separates out the zero-temperature contribution from the finite-temperature corrections the determination becomes essentially trivial. In essence, it only requires taking derivatives of the Heisenberg-Euler Lagrangian at one loop and zero temperature for the field strength. As a bonus, we then effectively dress the low-temperature contribution at two loops by one-particle reducible tadpole structures. This generates a subset of higher-loop contributions to the Heisenberg-Euler Lagrangian in the limit of low temperatures. We extract their leading strong-field behavior at a given loop order, and finally resum these to all loop orders.
summary: 在这篇文章中，我们证明了在两个环路产生的恒定电磁场中对海森堡-欧拉拉格朗日量的众所周知的领先低温校正可以从其单环路零温度模拟中有效地提取出来。借助平衡量子场论的实时形式主义，该形式主义明确地将零温度贡献与有限温度校正分开，确定变得基本上微不足道。本质上，它只需要在一次循环和零温度下对海森堡-欧拉拉格朗日求导即可得到场强。作为奖励，我们随后通过单粒子可还原蝌蚪结构有效地解决了两个环路的低温贡献。这在低温限制下生成了对海森堡-欧拉拉格朗日量的较高回路贡献的子集。我们在给定的循环顺序下提取它们的主要强场行为，并最终将它们恢复到所有循环顺序。

title: Higher-Spin Gravity in Two Dimensions with Vanishing Cosmological Constant
abstract: In this paper, we use a version of the BF formulation of two-dimensional dilaton gravity that allows to define a gauge theory of the two-dimensional Poincaré or Maxwell algebras and several of their higher-spin generalisations, both of finite and infinite dimension. The spectrum of the two-dimensional higher-spin gravity with vanishing cosmological constant based on the extended, infinite-dimensional higher-spin algebra is shown to contain an infinite collection of scalar degrees of freedom with a continuum of ever increasing mass, corresponding to the twisted-(co)adjoint representation. We comment on an approach to include backreaction of the scalar fields on the gravity sector at the level of formal equations of motion, thereby providing a first example of a fully interacting higher-spin gravity theory with vanishing cosmological constant in two dimensions.
summary: 在本文中，我们使用二维膨胀引力的 BF 公式的一个版本，它允许定义二维庞加莱或麦克斯韦代数的规范理论以及它们的几个更高自旋的推广，包括有限维和无限维。基于扩展的无限维高自旋代数，具有消失宇宙学常数的二维高自旋引力谱被证明包含标量自由度的无限集合，以及质量不断增加的连续体，对应于扭曲（共）伴随表示。我们评论了一种在形式运动方程层面上包含重力扇区标量场反作用的方法，从而提供了第一个完全相互作用的高自旋引力理论与二维宇宙学常数消失的例子。

title: Hard to shock DBI: wave propagation on planar domain walls
abstract: We investigate propagation of generic waves on thin planar domain walls effectively described by the scalar DBI model. We pay a particular attention to the possibility of caustic (shock) formation - the process, which may lead to intensive particle emission by domain walls. It is demonstrated that no singularities arise in DBI in 2D flat spacetime in the hyperbolic case, if one starts from smooth initial conditions. Technically, this happens because the same family characteristics of the relevant PDE remain parallel at all the times, albeit not being straight lines generically. Crucially, characteristic curves cease to be parallel beyond the simplified setup of DBI in 2D flat spacetime. In particular, this is shown to be the case in $D>2$ for spherical waves, in an expanding Universe, and in the case of a minimal deformation of DBI necessary for avoiding the domain wall problem in cosmology. However, we prove that DBI remains shock free in the hyperbolic case in all these physically relevant situations.
